data.title: JPMorgan Sees Stablecoin Market Below $600B by 2028
data.description:
JPMorgan projects stablecoin growth to $500–$600 billion by 2028, driven by crypto activity, not large-scale payment adoption.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/jpmorgan-sees-stablecoin-market-below-600b-by-2028/

data.title: North Korean crypto money launderer wanted by the FBI
data.description:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) has declared Sim Hyon-sop, an alleged cryptocurrency launderer for North Korea, wanted.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/north-korean-crypto-launderer-wanted-fbi/

data.title: Strategy Prepares Defensive Strategy Amid Bitcoin Challenges
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, a recent analysis reported by CNBC highlights that the stock price of Bitcoin treasury company Strategy remains low, with the Bitcoin premium indicator also declining. A crucial decision regarding whether the MSCI index will exclude Strategy is expected in January. In response to this situation, Strategy is adopting a 'defensive mode' strategy. Recently, the company has established a cash buffer of approximately $2.2 billion to withstand the challenges of its Bitcoin investments. This fund is anticipated to be used for paying preferred stock dividends and debt interest rather than purchasing additional Bitcoin.

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Giant Bitmain Cuts Prices on Mining Rigs
data.description:
Bitmain, the largest producer of Bitcoin mining hardware, has begun offering unusually steep discounts across multiple generations of ASICs.
source: https://coindoo.com/bitcoin-mining-giant-bitmain-cuts-prices-on-mining-rigs/

data.title: XRP set to drift sideways until new catalysts hit
data.description:
Nansen’s Jake Kennis says ETF approvals and integration with global payment rails may catalyze XRP price appreciation.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/xrp-set-to-drift-sideways/

data.title: Bitcoin May Enter Decade-Long Bull Run After 2025 Bear Market: Samson Mow
data.description:
Samson Mow and PlanC argue that 2025 marked a stealth bear market, setting the stage for a Bitcoin bull run.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-may-enter-decade-long-bull-run-after-2025-bear-market-samson-mow/

data.title: Aave DAO Vote Collapse Exposes Deep Fault Lines in Protocol Governance
data.description:
A pivotal governance vote inside the Aave ecosystem has failed decisively, triggering renewed debate over who truly controls the protocol’s future. On December 26, 2025, token holders rejected a proposal that aimed to shift ownership of Aave’s brand assets away from Aave Labs and into a DAO-controlled legal structure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/aave-dao-vote-collapse-exposes-deep-fault-lines-in-protocol-governance/

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts Ethereum Price Surge by 2026
data.description: According to Odaily, Tom Lee has suggested that the tokenization of assets could potentially drive the price of Ethereum (ETH) to between $7,000 and $9,000 by early 2026.

data.title: TRON Network Hits Record Usage While TRX Price Posts Its Worst Q4 in Years
data.description:
The TRON Network has achieved unprecedented levels of usage recently, experiencing a surge in activity that sets a new record, demonstrating its growing popularity and engagement among users. However, despite this impressive milestone, the price of TRX has faced significant challenges, recording its worst performance in the fourth quarter in several years, indicating a stark contrast between the network's operational success and the struggles faced in the cryptocurrency market.
source: https://blocknews.com/tron-network-hits-record-usage-while-trx-price-posts-its-worst-q4-in-years/

data.title: Tom Lee: Asset tokenization may push ETH to $7,000 to $9,000 by early 2026.
data.description: Tom Lee stated that asset tokenization could push the price of ETH to $7,000 to $9,000 by early 2026. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: CBB: Previous judgments were wrong; Lighter participants may reap significant rewards.
data.description: Crypto trader CBB posted on the X platform that his judgment regarding Lighter was significantly flawed, stating that his previous assessment was "seriously off-target, causing him to miss an important opportunity." CBB indicated that further errors are possible, but he hopes the overall accuracy rate will outweigh the impact of these mistakes. He also congratulated users who participated in Lighter, believing they are likely to achieve considerable results and that they "deserve a reward." Previous news: Lighter AMA: 50% of tokens allocated to the community, confirming the introduction of a token buyback mechanism.

data.title: Bitcoin’s price swings aren’t random and Japan is proving it
data.description:
Japanese researchers say they have identified early warning signs of crypto price fluctuations by using AI to analyze blockchain transaction networks.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoins-price-swings-arent-random/

data.title: ADA Price Tests Critical Support While Analysts Watch for a Short-Term Reversal
data.description:
The price of Cardano (ADA) has recently approached a significant support level, which is crucial for its market stability. In this pivotal moment, analysts and investors are closely monitoring the situation for signs of a potential short-term reversal in the cryptocurrency's price movement. This critical support level is not only important for maintaining the current price trends but is also seen as a key indicator of ADA's future performance. Many experts are analyzing various market indicators and trends, as they believe that a bounce from this support could signal a positive shift, while a breakdown might lead to further declines. As the market fluctuates, all eyes are on ADA's price action and the surrounding sentiment among traders to gauge the likelihood of any upcoming changes in the asset's trajectory.
source: https://blocknews.com/ada-price-tests-critical-support-while-analysts-watch-for-a-short-term-reversal/

data.title: Bitdeer mined 146.2 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,998.3 BTC.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of December 26, its Bitcoin holdings were 1,998.3 BTC. In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 146.2 BTC, but it sold 144.7 BTC during the same period. The total Bitcoin holdings increased by 1.5 BTC compared to last week.

data.title: Bitcoin’s Pullback Is Becoming a Powerful Tax Hack for US Investors
data.description:
As stocks rally and Bitcoin stays 30% below its peak, savvy US investors are using BTC losses to legally wipe out capital gains taxes on booming equities.
source: https://btcusa.com/bitcoins-pullback-is-becoming-a-powerful-tax-hack-for-us-investors/

data.title: Scientists Achieve Record Control of Light at Nanoscale
data.description:
Researchers develop a two-step method to steer nanoscale light, achieving record-quality higher-order polaritons and enabling advanced photonic circuits and sensing.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/scientists-achieve-record-control-of-light-at-nanoscale/
